summary: A rectangular bunker-style structure with a stepped brick pyramid roof, concrete foundation and perimeter, yellow-tinted stone walls with horizontal window openings, and a recessed entrance area. The building sits in an excavated pit with dirt and concrete borders.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof

rebuild_hints: Build rectangular concrete foundation platform first
Construct yellow-tinted stone walls with 3-block height
Add horizontal row of 5-6 window openings evenly spaced
Create concrete trim band above windows
Build stepped brick pyramid roof with 4-5 ascending layers, each layer smaller and centered
Add concrete perimeter border around entire structure at ground level
Excavate surrounding pit area with dirt blocks
Ensure bilateral symmetry on all axes
uncertainties: Exact window count and spacing - appears to be 5-6 windows but precise positioning unclear
Interior layout and floor plan not visible
Exact stone block variant (sandstone vs yellow concrete vs other yellow material)
Depth of excavation pit and exact concrete border dimensions
Whether structure has interior rooms or is solid
